name: Storz & Bickel Capsule Caddy Holder Keychain
summary: This Storz & Bickel Capsule Caddy is an essential accessory for any on-the-go S&B Vaporiser user.
description: This Storz & Bickel Capsule Caddy is an essential accessory for any on-the-go S&B Vaporiser user. With its odour-proof and waterproof design, it can conveniently hold up to four capsules, keeping your herbs fresh and ready to use. Easily attach it to your keychain for effortless portability. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
